query: COP30 119 countries new NDCs submitted UNFCCC official registry list
a_issues: Does not contain any source explicitly stating '119 countries' or listing the countries; the NDCREG snippet is just a scrape of some file names/dates with no count; contains an irrelevant COP26 result that adds noise; the 21-countries figure (IIED) is from six months before COP30 and does not match the question's 119 figure.
b_issues: Also lacks any explicit '119 countries' figure or a curated list of the countries; the NDCREG snippet only shows a handful of country filings without a total count; the CAT 2035 tracker result is just a long list of country links with no explanit total, and the Fastmarkets '29 NDCs' and NDC Partnership '13 countries' figures add extra, potentially confusing numbers that don't match 119 either.
reasoning: Neither content set provides the specific figure of 119 countries or an actual UNFCCC registry list matching that number. Both instead surface the same authoritative counter-fact (the official UNFCCC synthesis report citing 64 new NDCs recorded between Jan 2024 and Sept 2025 via the SDG/IISD article), which is useful for correcting or contextualizing the premise, but neither set supplies a definitive 119-country list or breakdown. Content A adds a slightly outdated 21-country figure and an irrelevant COP26 link; Content B adds extra, non-matching numbers (29, 13, 100+) and a long but uninformative country-link list from Climate Action Tracker. Both are equally incomplete and equally likely to leave an LLM unable to confirm the 119-country claim, so the two results are roughly equivalent in usefulness.
